text: Here, in this bright, modern space, I am surrounded by the energy of inquiry and innovation. The glass, lights, and angular architecture make me both curious and a little unsettled—the environment feels open, yet the clean lines and emptiness inspire a sense of distance. As I move closer to the R+D wall, I feel an intellectual spark. The words about humans and machines provoke me to ponder our evolving relationship with technology. I feel like a participant in the ongoing narrative of progress—alert, engaged, and questioning.
